nasb.text: You will live in the land that I gave to your forefathers; so you will be My people, and I will be your God.

esv.text: You shall dwell in the land that I gave to your fathers, and you shall be my people, and I will be your God.

cnv.text: 你們要住在我賜給你們列祖的地；你們要作我的子民，我要作你們的　神。

ccb.text: 你们必安居在我赐给你们祖先的土地上。你们要做我的子民，我要做你们的上帝。
